name: Byrd Elementary School
description: Byrd Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Goochland, VA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Central High Cultural & Educational Complex
description: Central High Cultural & Educational Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Goochland, VA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Goochland County Parks And Rec Sports Complex
description: Goochland County Parks And Rec Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Goochland, VA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Goochland Family YMCA
description: Goochland Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Goochland, VA. There are 3 courts. 2 are outdoors and 1 is indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Goochland Randolph Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at Goochland Randolph Elementary School in Crozier, VA! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: Hermitage Country Club
description: Hermitage Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Manakin-Sabot, VA. There are 12 hard courts. 8 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, locker rooms, lights, trainers or lessons, and youth programming. The courts are private. The courts can be reserved.
open_play_schedule: Outdoor  courts are open from 6:00am to 9:00 pm 7 days a week year round outside.
fees: Private — Private club but guests allowed with a $10 fee

name: J. Sargeant Reynolds Community College
description: J. Sargeant Reynolds Community College is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Goochland, VA. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Yello Club
description: Yello Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Manakin-Sabot, VA. There are 2 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Court Rentals can be made by the hour or through membership ($55/month) for a discount
